summary: Referral System Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs verified (14/14 tests pass), all frontend UI components working. Fixed bug where Share & Earn button was unreachable due to own-profile redirect.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: PublicProfile.js redirect logic was preventing users from accessing Share & Earn button - removed useEffect that redirected own profile to dashboard (line 297-302)
All 5 social share buttons (WhatsApp, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Email) working correctly
QR code generation working via react-qr-code library
Referral code validation is case-insensitive as expected
Self-referral and duplicate referral prevention working in process_referral()
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during signup tests for referral testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully tested. Share & Earn button visible at /profile/{username} for own profile. Referral modal has Share tab (with 5 share options, QR, copy link) and Coin Board tab (leaderboard). Signup page shows referral badge when ?ref= param present. Test user testbug has 2 coins and 2 referrals.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/referral/my-code authenticated: PASS - Returns referral code (UJI1BVOU), coins, referrals
backend_api_tests.GET /api/referral/my-code consistency: PASS - Same code returned each time
backend_api_tests.GET /api/referral/leaderboard structure: PASS - Contains id, name, username, referral_coins
backend_api_tests.Invalid referral code on signup: PASS - Signup works, no coin awarded
backend_api_tests.Self-referral prevention: PASS - Logic prevents same user from earning

frontend_ui_tests.referral_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens on button click
frontend_ui_tests.modal_share_tab: PASS - Contains referral link, QR, share buttons
frontend_ui_tests.share_buttons_5_platforms: PASS - WhatsApp, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Email all visible
frontend_ui_tests.signup_referral_badge: PASS - Badge shows at /signup?ref=UJI1BVOU with message 'Referred by a friend!'

bug_fix_applied.issue: Share & Earn button was unreachable because PublicProfile.js had useEffect that redirected own profile to dashboard
bug_fix_applied.fix: Removed the redirect logic so users can access their own public profile with Share & Earn button
bug_fix_applied.verification: Button now visible and modal works correctly
